SpecAILimit.description: AILimit represents quota/threshold setup for AI-related features.

days.description: The number of days over which the quota is calculated.

max_credit.description: The maximum number of credits ( eg. could be tokens or price,etc) allowed.

SpecEndorLicenseBundleInfo.description:
EndorLicenseBundleInfo provides information about a specific license
bundle.

expiration_time.description: The time when the license bundle expires.

limit.description: A value of 0 or -1 corresponds to an unlimited license.

SpecEndorLicenseBundleType.description:
Enum representing different types of Endor Labs license bundles.

 - ENDOR_LICENSE_BUNDLE_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Default value. Should not be used.
 - ENDOR_LICENSE_BUNDLE_TYPE_OSS_CORE: Open Source Software (OSS) Core license bundle.
 - ENDOR_LICENSE_BUNDLE_TYPE_OSS_PRO: Open Source Software (OSS) Pro license bundle.
 - ENDOR_LICENSE_BUNDLE_TYPE_CICD: Continuous Integration/Continuous Deployment (CI/CD) license bundle.
 - ENDOR_LICENSE_BUNDLE_TYPE_SECRETS: Secrets Management license bundle.
 - ENDOR_LICENSE_BUNDLE_TYPE_SBOM_HUB: Software Bill of Materials (SBOM) Hub license bundle.
 - ENDOR_LICENSE_BUNDLE_TYPE_SUPPLY_CHAIN: Supply Chain Security license bundle.
 - ENDOR_LICENSE_BUNDLE_TYPE_ENDOR_PATCHING: Endor Patching license bundle.
 - ENDOR_LICENSE_BUNDLE_TYPE_CODE: Discover risks in 1st party code.
 - ENDOR_LICENSE_BUNDLE_TYPE_ENDOR_OUTPOST: Endor Outpost license bundle.
 - ENDOR_LICENSE_BUNDLE_TYPE_SECURITY_REVIEW: Security Review license bundle.
 - ENDOR_LICENSE_BUNDLE_TYPE_CODE_PRO: Discover risks in 1st party code using AI.

SpecEndorLicenseFeatureType.description:
- ENDOR_LICENSE_FEATURE_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Type is undefined.
 - ENDOR_LICENSE_FEATURE_TYPE_SCM_POSTURE_MANAGEMENT: SCM Posture Management corresponds to endorctl's Github Scanner and
ensure your respository's configuration is correct.
 - ENDOR_LICENSE_FEATURE_TYPE_SCA: SCA corresponds to endorctl's Git Scanner and runs the Software
Composition Analysis.
 - ENDOR_LICENSE_FEATURE_TYPE_SECRETS: Secrets corresponds to endorctl's Secrets Scanner.
 - ENDOR_LICENSE_FEATURE_TYPE_SBOM_INGESTION: SBOM (Software Bill of Materials) Ingestion feature for ingesting SBOM
data.
 - ENDOR_LICENSE_FEATURE_TYPE_CONTAINER_SCAN: Container Scan feature for scanning container images.
 - ENDOR_LICENSE_FEATURE_TYPE_RECOMMENDATION: Recommendation feature provides recommendations based on change impact
analysis results.
 - ENDOR_LICENSE_FEATURE_TYPE_CICD_DISCOVERY: CI/CD Discovery feature discovers CI/CD pipelines tools and
configurations.
 - ENDOR_LICENSE_FEATURE_TYPE_ARTIFACT_SIGN: Artifact Signing feature allows signing artifacts.
 - ENDOR_LICENSE_FEATURE_TYPE_ENDOR_PATCHING: Endor Patching feature allows accessing Endor Labs factory.
 - ENDOR_LICENSE_FEATURE_TYPE_SAST: SAST feature allows scanning source code for security vulnerabilities.
 - ENDOR_LICENSE_FEATURE_TYPE_AI_MODELS: AI Models feature allows scanning source code for AI model usage.
 - ENDOR_LICENSE_FEATURE_TYPE_ENDOR_OUTPOST: Endor Outpost feature allows automated scanning on-premises.
 - ENDOR_LICENSE_FEATURE_TYPE_AI_INFERENCE: AI Inference feature allows querying AI models.
 - ENDOR_LICENSE_FEATURE_TYPE_SECURITY_REVIEW: Security Review feature allows reviewing security code.
 - ENDOR_LICENSE_FEATURE_TYPE_GITHUB_ACTIONS: Github Actions feature allows scanning Github Actions workflows.
 - ENDOR_LICENSE_FEATURE_TYPE_AI_SAST: AI SAST feature allows triage/detection of false positives of SAST findings using AI.
 - ENDOR_LICENSE_FEATURE_TYPE_PACKAGE_FIREWALL: Package Firewall feature allows evaluating packages for security.
 - ENDOR_LICENSE_FEATURE_TYPE_ENDOR_ENRICHMENT: Endor Enrichment feature allows access to Endor-proprietary data.

SpecEndorLicenseInfo.description:
EndorLicenseInfo provides information about a specific feature type and
its limit.

expiration_time.description: The time when the license expires.

limit.description: A value of 0 or -1 corresponds to an unlimited license.

SpecEndorLicenseType.description:
EndorLicenseType represents the type of Endor Labs license.

 - ENDOR_LICENSE_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Type is undefined.
 - ENDOR_LICENSE_TYPE_FREE_TRIAL: FREE TRIAL license is used for self-service signup workflow.
 - ENDOR_LICENSE_TYPE_FREE_TIER: FREE TIER license for free restricted access to Endor Labs products.
 - ENDOR_LICENSE_TYPE_PREMIUM: PREMIUM license for paid customers.
 - ENDOR_LICENSE_TYPE_POV: Sales-led POC Customer.

SpecLicenseConfiguration.description: LicenseConfiguration is the configuration for the Endor Labs license.

security_review_configuration.description: The configuration for the security review.

SpecQuota.description: Quota for the Endor Labs license.

ai_limit.description: The token level limits set for AI features.

max_daily_cloud_scans.description: The maximum number of cloud scans per day.

max_daily_pr_scans.description: The maximum number of cloud pr_scans per day.

SpecSecurityReviewConfiguration.description: SecurityReviewConfiguration is the configuration for the security review.

max_pr_reviews_per_month.description: The maximum number of PR reviews per month.

@type.description:
A URL/resource name that uniquely identifies the type of the serialized
protocol buffer message. This string must contain at least
one "/" character. The last segment of the URL's path must represent
the fully qualified name of the type (as in
`path/google.protobuf.Duration`). The name should be in a canonical form
(e.g., leading "." is not accepted).

In practice, teams usually precompile into the binary all types that they
expect it to use in the context of Any. However, for URLs which use the
scheme `http`, `https`, or no scheme, one can optionally set up a type
server that maps type URLs to message definitions as follows:

* If no scheme is provided, `https` is assumed.
* An HTTP GET on the URL must yield a [google.protobuf.Type][]
  value in binary format, or produce an error.
* Applications are allowed to cache lookup results based on the
  URL, or have them precompiled into a binary to avoid any
  lookup. Therefore, binary compatibility needs to be preserved
  on changes to types. (Use versioned type names to manage
  breaking changes.)

Note: this functionality is not currently available in the official
protobuf release, and it is not used for type URLs beginning with
type.googleapis.com. As of May 2023, there are no widely used type server
implementations and no plans to implement one.

Schemes other than `http`, `https` (or the empty scheme) might be
used with implementation specific semantics.

v1EndorLicense.description: EndorLicense represents a specific Endor license assigned to a tenant.

meta.description: Metadata is generic for any object.

spec.description: The specification of the Endor Labs license.

tenant_meta.description: EndorLicenses are associated with a tenant.

uuid.description: The UUID of an Endor Labs license.

bundle_info.description: A repeated field containing information about Endor Labs license bundles.

is_customer.description: Indicates whether the license belongs to a customer.

license_configurations.description: The configuration for the Endor Labs license.

license_info.description:
An array that stores the types of valid feature licenses and their
limits. Protobuf does not allow enums to be the key of maps. Ensure that
any code accessing this array checks for an existing type before writing.

quota.description: Quota for the Endor Labs license.

read_access_until.description:
Optional. Indicates the time upto to which users of this tenant have read
access.

salesforce_account_id.description:
Salesforce Account ID for CRM integration.
Links this license to a Salesforce account for revenue attribution and
customer success reporting.

Format: Salesforce IDs are either 15 or 18 characters:
- 15 chars: case-sensitive alphanumeric (0-9, a-z, A-Z)
- 18 chars: 15-char ID + 3-char case-safe checksum
Pattern validates format only, not checksum correctness.
Ref: https://stackoverflow.com/questions/9742913/validating-a-salesforce-id

target_namespace.description: Target namespace of the Endor Labs license.

type.description: Type of license assigned to the tenant.

write_access_until.description: The time upto to which users of this tenant have write access.

v1IndexData.description:
IndexData is used to index the resource for search. It's an internal
object.

search_score.description: search_score is the score of the resource for search. Internal use only.

will_be_deleted_at.description: Time that the resource will be deleted.

v1Meta.description: Common fields for all Endor Labs resources.

annotations.description:
Annotations can be used to attach metadata to a resource message.
Annotation values can be small or large, structured or unstructured,
and may include characters not permitted by labels.
The keys may contain alphanumerics, underscores (_), dots (.) and dashes
(-). The values of an annotation must be 16384 bytes or smaller.

create_time.description:
Time the resource was created.

Format: 2017-01-15T01:30:15.01Z
RFC 3339: https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3339.txt.

created_by.description:
Name and authentication source of the user who created the object,
for example, ewok@endor.ai@google@api-key.

description.description: Resource description. Must be less than 1024 bytes.

kind.description:
Resource kind, for example, HelloResponse.
Auto-generated using the protobuf message proto.MessageName().Name().

name.description: Resource name. Must be 63 characters or less.

parent_kind.description: Parent object resource kind, for example, Project.

references.description: Map of objects referenced in a query API.

tags.description:
List of tags attached to the resource.
Tags can be used to select objects and to find collections of objects that
satisfy certain conditions. A tag must be 63 characters or less.

update_time.description:
Time the resource was last updated.
Note: Updated on all create/patch/delete operations.

Format: 2017-01-15T01:30:15.01Z
RFC 3339: https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3339.txt.

updated_by.description:
Name and authentication source of the last user who updated the object,
for example, vulnerabilityingestor@endor.ai@x509.

upsert_time.description:
Time the resource was last upserted.

Note:
create_time is only set the first time the resource is created.
upsert_time is set every time the resource is upseted.

Format: 2017-01-15T01:30:15.01Z
RFC 3339: https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3339.txt.

v1TenantMeta.description: Tenant related data for the tenant containing the resource.

namespace.description:
Namespaces are a way to organize organizational units into virtual
groupings of resources. Namespaces must be a fully qualified name,
for example, the child namespace of namespace "endor.prod" called "app"
is called "endor.prod.app".
